reasoning: The SOC2 control CC6.6 focuses on implementing logical access security measures to protect against external threats. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security and access control measures. NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict ingress traffic by default, ensuring that only explicitly allowed traffic is permitted. Services of type LoadBalancer should be restricted to prevent unnecessary exposure to the internet. TLS should be enabled for Ingress resources to secure data in transit. Additionally, disabling anonymous authentication on the API server helps prevent unauthorized access.
title: CC6.6 The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries
